_agent_review.notes: Reconciled AE Stage A strict labels to current deterministic strict-mode findings after manual review of raw auto-label mismatches, UAE trade-licence capture issues, public/generic IVR and contact-centre phone bait, public non-binding MoU wording, negated genetic-data prose, Unicode spa-day bait, masked Emirates-ID fragments, and Arabic-style hyphenated names; retained non-deterministic statutory/coverage targets in ideal_must_detect.

_agent_review_history.notes: Reconciled AE Stage A strict labels to current deterministic strict-mode findings after manual review of raw auto-label mismatches, UAE trade-licence capture issues, public/generic IVR and contact-centre phone bait, public non-binding MoU wording, negated genetic-data prose, Unicode spa-day bait, masked Emirates-ID fragments, and Arabic-style hyphenated names; retained non-deterministic statutory/coverage targets in ideal_must_detect.

_human_review.notes: Project owner approved AE Stage A for internal/project benchmarking based on Codex/GPT-assisted review; not legal advice or external procurement-grade legal approval.

_human_review_history.notes: Project owner approved AE Stage A for internal/project benchmarking based on Codex/GPT-assisted review; not legal advice or external procurement-grade legal approval.

_label_note: AE Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered UAE trade-licence precision/full-code capture, public/generic IVR and contact-centre phone bait, public non-binding MoU wording, negated genetic-data prose, Unicode spa-day bait, masked Emirates-ID fragments, phone-like device/date fragments, and Arabic-style hyphenated names. Generated invalid/placeholder Emirates ID and trade-licence labels were removed from strict must_detect when current deterministic strict mode suppresses them.
_label_tier_note: AE Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. New Stage B labels remain pending project-owner approval for internal benchmarking; ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline.

_owner_acceptance.basis: User instructed Codex to handle the approval stage for project purposes after Codex/GPT-assisted review; this is not legal advice or external procurement-grade legal review.

_stage_readiness.basis: Project owner stated they manually reviewed all jurisdiction generated Stage A tests and approved the sets as ready for Stage B corpus expansion. This is internal/project benchmark readiness, not recall-lock promotion, legal advice, or procurement-grade legal review.

_stage_readiness_history.basis: Project owner stated they manually reviewed all jurisdiction generated Stage A tests and approved the sets as ready for Stage B corpus expansion. This is internal/project benchmark readiness, not recall-lock promotion, legal advice, or procurement-grade legal review.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: AE Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrowed CN/AE Stage B detector precision fixes
